messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Variables

### Variables File

```hcl
# variables.tf
variable "compartment_id" {
  description = "Compartment OCID"
  type        = string
}

variable "region" {
  description = "OCI Region"
  type        = string
  default    = "us-ashburn-1"
}

variable "vcn_cidr" {
  description = "VCN CIDR block"
  type        = string
  default    = "10.0.0.0/16"
}

variable "compute_shape" {
  description = "Compute shape"
  type        = string
  default    = "VM.Standard2.1"
}
```

### terraform.tfvars

```hcl
compartment_id = "ocid1.compartment.oc1..."
region         = "us-ashburn-1"
vcn_cidr       = "172.16.0.0/16"
```

### Environment Variables

```bash
export TF_VAR_compartment_id="ocid1..."
```
